reviews.review_description: This game was 5 stars, sadly less cosmetics and most of them cost money the levels were interesting the monsters were not to scary I named the level 3 monster jimmy if you have a fear of spiders don’t go and meet jimmy because he is a spider and the monsters aren’t to fast so it’s easier to complete the levels I recommend this game BTW may make a vid on it if I don’t look at my channel w4termelonvr (not posted yet)

I loved this game and played it early on when it was born. I had rare cosmetics and almost every single one in game. The cosmetics I had was everything in the second shop revamp, the parkor hat, everything in the valentines update, and the rare badge that has the lvl 1 monster and a player in front of it. This game fell off for me ever since the the new levels. I had many currencies in the game, about 380. The game is good I’ll give it that, but I HATE that all my hours of playing is gone. This used to be my favorite game on the Vr, but now I’m almost convinced that I should delete it.

Please give my progress back if you can.

I installed this game yesterday. Had some fun, got to level 4, and got off due to headset battery. Today, after not having done anything since then, I open the game to see I got BANNED for 3 DAYS? Don't get me wrong. I loved my first time on this game. But, this roblox type ban really threw my opinion of it into the gutter.

Fear Massive is an exceptional blend of suspense, strategy, and heart-pounding action that keeps you on the edge of your seat from start to finish. The game masterfully combines atmospheric tension with deep gameplay mechanics, drawing players into its immersive world. The graphics are stunning, with meticulously crafted environments that perfectly complement the eerie tone. The narrative is gripping, offering an intriguing story that keeps you invested while also leaving room for plenty of surprises. The enemy AI is impressive, challenging players without feeling overwhelming, and the variety of weapons and abilities ensures every encounter feels fresh. Overall, Fear Massive is a thrilling experience that delivers an unforgettable adventure and is a must-play for fans of the genre.
I love this game, great job screen!

reviews.review_title: Uh, very bad. Please put more effort😭🙏
reviews.review_description: First, there are no online players. As soon as I got on the game, I waited in the lobby for 1 hour for someone to come back and help me. Next, the monster is very broken and bad. It was stuck in one spot unless someone got close. Whenever someone got close, if they ran away, it would run back to the spot it got stuck in. Also, the cosmetic system is horrible. I bought Mt first cosmetic, and I had to reset my game to get it. DONT waste your time playing this game.
You made such an amazing game. No matter the struggles or difficulties that came your way you still locked in and decided to absolutely smash it great job mate.
Cheers mate my nans just put rocks in the washing basket saying shes gotten 10 dusty stones

reviews.review_title: Finally it’s here and it’s good
reviews.review_description: Sooo  it’s finally here it’s been over a year and this game is surprisingly good and I was sweating on level 3 it’s like so difficult  I never thought I would have trouble on a gtag horror game also I don’t usually get scared on vr it’s usually just get caught play jump scare and respawn but these jumpscares well they kinda got me and I’ve handled lethal ape and capuchin and lost n found and a lot more but something about these jump scares got me so yeah was it worth the wait well in my opinion yes yes it was screen you out did your self good job I can’t wait to see where the game goes
W
